project.name: BMAD-METHOD
project.description: Structured agent-assisted software delivery with core orchestration, a full BMM lifecycle and a universal installer.

nodes.name: Core Skills
nodes.summary: Shared help, orchestration, research, review, elicitation, brainstorming and collaboration skills.

nodes.name: BMM Lifecycle
nodes.summary: Software delivery lifecycle spanning analysis, planning, solutioning and implementation.

nodes.name: Universal Installer
nodes.summary: Node CLI that configures modules and renders BMAD skills for supported AI hosts.

nodes.name: Core Module Config
nodes.summary: Shared user, project, language and output-folder configuration.

nodes.name: BMM Module Config
nodes.summary: BMM artifact paths, user skill level and agent roster.

nodes.name: bmad-cli.js
nodes.summary: Commander CLI entrypoint for installation and lifecycle commands.

nodes.name: bmad-help
nodes.summary: Reads installed catalog and project artifacts to route the user to the next relevant skill.

nodes.name: create-product-brief
nodes.summary: Frames problem, users, value and boundaries.

nodes.name: create-prd
nodes.summary: Creates product requirements for downstream design and delivery.

nodes.name: create-architecture
nodes.summary: Turns requirements into technical architecture and delivery decisions.

nodes.name: create-epics-and-stories
nodes.summary: Decomposes requirements and architecture into implementation units.

nodes.name: sprint-planning
nodes.summary: Creates sprint execution state from planned work.

nodes.name: dev-story
nodes.summary: Implements an approved story using test-first discipline.

nodes.name: code-review
nodes.summary: Reviews implementation against requirements and repository evidence.

nodes.name: BMAD Quality
nodes.summary: Formatting, linting, docs, installer, reference and skill validation.

nodes.name: DW BMAD Publisher
nodes.summary: Packages pinned external BMAD source as a deterministic skills-only DW Power.

nodes.name: Excluded Development Assets
nodes.summary: Documentation, evaluation and generated web assets excluded from runtime distribution.

layers.name: Installation and Distribution
layers.description: Official installer and DW wrapper publisher.

layers.name: Quality and Exclusions
layers.description: Quality pipeline and intentionally excluded development assets.

tour.title: Route with bmad-help
tour.description: Inspect installed state and select the next relevant BMAD skill.

tour.title: Analyze and plan
tour.description: Frame the opportunity and create the PRD.

tour.title: Design and decompose
tour.description: Create architecture, then epics and stories.

tour.title: Implement and review
tour.description: Plan the sprint, implement stories and review evidence.

tour.title: Package for DW
tour.description: Select runtime skills and installer dependencies while rejecting non-runtime assets.
